constraint_slots: mechanism, capability, and artifact family must remain distinct
outputs must preserve failure modes and exclusions

failure_slots: naming layers collapse into one ambiguous term
extraction produces attractive prose without downstream leverage
operators cannot be normalized or compared across artifacts
boundary_slots: elegant symbolic prose alone does not complete the loop
failure modes and exclusions are required output, not optional commentary

the mapping adds style but no compression over simpler description
metaphor, model, and mechanism collapse into one category during use
boundary_slots: metaphor must not be confused with mechanism
formalization must produce a meaningful discontinuity rather than richer lore gloss

the roadmap remains architectural aspiration without executable module boundaries
